biography: The official Instagram for Marvel comics, movies, games, and more.

latestIgtvVideos.caption: In celebration of Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, @Disney is hosting community screenings of the film across the country and awarding $1 million in grants to support youth in STEM and the arts. Learn more about the Disney Future Storytellers initiative on Marvel.com.

An iconic cast.
 
Watch to see who knows their castmate best and see Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: Wakanda Forever in theaters tonight. Get tickets now: Link in Bio

Which characters would make a dream team? Hear from the cast and director of Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: Wakanda Forever.

Experience the film in theaters tonight.
When a new threat keeps the citizens of Dashville from achieving their dreams, The Dashers answer the call to save the day. Find out if good prevails in our new comic story with @doordash!

Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: Wakanda Forever is almost here! Get ready for the film’s debut with the soundtrack, @ProximityMedia’s Black Panther podcast, and more! It’s time for your #MarvelMinute with host @JoshSaleh.

A true visionary.
 
Go behind the making-of Ryan Coogler’s Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, only in theaters this Friday. Get tickets now: Link in Bio.

Discover @m_giacchino’s dream behind the making of Marvel Studios’ Special Presentation: Werewolf by Night.
 
Marvel Studios’ Special Presentation: Director by Night is now streaming only on @DisneyPlus.

In one week, Wakanda returns. Witness Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: #WakandaForever, only in theaters November 11.

Get tickets now: Link in Bio.

Witness the making of #SheHulk: Attorney at Law. 💚💪
 
Marvel Studios' Assembled: The Making of She-Hulk: Attorney at Law, an Original special, is now streaming on @DisneyPlus.

“He’s coming for the surface world.”
 
In 10 days, experience Namor in Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: Wakanda Forever. Get tickets now: Link in Bio.
What does it take to rule an underwater kingdom? 🌊 Witness @TenochHuerta as Namor in Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: #WakandaForever.
How did She-Hulk smash her way to the screen? 👊 Go behind the scenes of Marvel Studios' #SheHulk: Attorney at Law with VFX Supervisors Shannon Justison and Dadi Einarsson.
